title: Map
description: A shareable drillset identity -- either a builtin drill or a parsed textbook. See docs/MAP_HASHING.md for how map_hash is computed for uploaded textbooks.

map_hash.description: Stable identity hash. For builtin drills this can just be the drill id; for textbooks it's a hash of the parsed, structured problem set.

drills.description: List of drill ids included in this map
